title: C schnorr48 accepts non-canonical pubkey encodings
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/link/schnorr48.c + Monocypher fe_frombytes (monocypher.c:1176): C accepts non-canonical pubkey encodings (y >= p decodes without rejection); Python schnorr48.py rejects them via crypto_core_ed25519_is_valid_point (ge25519_is_canonical). A signature under a non-canonical pubkey encoding could verify in C but fail in Python — cross-implementation divergence, against the project rule that all implementations produce identical output. Present in this tree AND on origin/main (schnorr48_pubkey_valid checks only the 8 low-order encodings). Fix: add canonical-encoding rejection in C (compare y < p) or document the divergence.
